headline: Citi Raises Seagate and Western Digital Targets as AI Data Demand Supercharges Storage Pricing
summary: Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX) stock and Western Digital (NASDAQ:WDC) stock are both trading higher Monday morning after Citi raised its price targets on both names, maintaining Buy ratings on each. The move adds to a wave of bullish analyst activity that’s been building across the storage sector over the past two weeks. Citi raised its Seagate ... headline: A Massive Storage Shift Is Underway — And Western Digital (WDC) May Be At The Center
summary: Western Digital Corporation (NASDAQ:WDC) is among the 10 High-Flying AI Stocks to Buy. On April 8, Evercore ISI raised its price target on Western Digital Corporation (NASDAQ:WDC) to $378 from $310 while maintaining an Outperform rating, highlighting a renewed focus on hard disk drives as a key beneficiary of the structural memory shift.
